🌙 Overnight6:00 PM – Next day 4:00 PM

NU Overnight

Sleep in a dorm. Eat in the dining hall. Be an NU Eagle for 24 hours.

Pick your date

Register for Thursday, September 24, 2026 🛍️ Swoop Shop

What an NU Overnight actually looks like

Placeholder — video coming soon

What to expect

The NU Overnight is the best way to know if this is the right fit. You'll stay in a residence hall with a current student host, eat at Sæter, attend real classes, and get the unfiltered truth about the NU experience. Parents: your student is in good hands — our overnight hosts are trained, vetted, and excited to show off their home.

Your day

6:00 PM
🏠

Arrival & Check-in

Meet your student host and get settled in the residence hall.

Cascade Hall Lobby

6:30 PM
🌮

Dinner at Sæter

Dine with your host and their friends. First test: the taco bar.

Sæter Dining Hall

7:30 PM
🎮

Evening Activity

Hosted game night, worship, or campus event — depends on the night.

University Center

10:00 PM
😴

Wind Down

Head to your host's room. Quiet hours start at 11 PM.

Residence Hall

8:00 AM
🥞

Breakfast

Fuel up before the morning sessions.

Sæter Dining Hall

9:00 AM
📖

Morning Classes

Sit in on two real NU classes — you pick which ones.

Academic Buildings

11:00 AM
💬

Campus Life Chat

Open Q&A with student life staff and current students.

Student Center

12:00 PM
👋

Lunch & Goodbyes

One last meal, then wrap up. We'll help arrange rides or transit.

Sæter Dining Hall

What to bring

🛏️Sleeping bag or blankets (we provide pillows and towels)
👕Change of clothes + PJ pants for the next morning
🧴Toiletries + anything you need to feel comfortable overnight
📱Phone (charger too — outlets exist)
💊Personal meds or allergy EpiPen if needed
🎒Small backpack for carrying stuff between buildings

Dress code

Casual

Athleisure, jeans, whatever you'd wear on a casual college day. Classes tomorrow are real classes — your student's host will be dressed normally.

👨‍👩‍👧

A note for parents & guardians

Sending your student to sleep over at a college can feel like a big step. Here's exactly what to expect and how we keep them safe and comfortable.

🛡️

Vetted student hosts

Every NU Overnight host completes a background check and a multi-day training on safety, inclusion, and student wellbeing. They genuinely want to be hosts — it's not an assignment.

🏥

Health & dietary support

We accommodate food allergies, medical needs, and dietary restrictions. Register early and include any notes so our team can prepare in advance.

📱

Always reachable

Your student can use their phone to call or text you anytime. Their host will share the student life on-call number before bed in case of any issues.

🚪

Easy early exit

If anything doesn't feel right — for any reason — early checkout is available with no questions asked. Your student's comfort and safety come first.

Thinking about cost? You're not alone.

Most families have the same conversation. We'll make sure you have a real number — not a ballpark — before your student applies.

Talk to financial aid →

Questions & answers
